headline: Exclusive-Chevron, Shell closing in on first big oil production deals in Venezuela since US captured Maduro, sources say
summary: HOUSTON/CARACAS, March 10 (Reuters) - International oil majors Chevron and Shell are closing in on the first big oil production deals with Venezuela since the U. capture of President Nicolas Maduro in January, five sources close to the negotiations told Reuters.

headline: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: The S&P 500 ended Tuesday lower following a bout of volatile trading as investors sought to keep up with the latest developments in the Iran war.

headline: Valero Energy (VLO) and Baker Hughes (BKR) Stocks Surge While First Solar (FSLR) Sinks in 2026
summary: Three energy-adjacent stocks tell three very different stories in 2026 so far. Valero Energy (NYSE:VLO) and Baker Hughes (NASDAQ:BKR) have been on an absolute tear, while First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) has been quietly sinking. As of this morning, VLO stock trades at around $218, BKR stock near $60, and FSLR stock close to $197. There are ... headline: AI in Oil and Gas Industry Research Report 2026-2035: Market to Surpass $7.5 Billion by 2030 with IBM, Microsoft, Google, Intel Schlumberger, Halliburton, Baker Hughes Leading
summary: Key market opportunities in AI for oil and gas include enhancing operational efficiency, cost reduction, and safety compliance. Growth is driven by real-time decision-making needs, smart oilfield expansion, and rising exploration. Trends include predictive maintenance, IoT integration, and robotics use. headline: Iran war threatens catastrophic consequences for the oil market, Aramco CEO says
summary: Saudi Aramco beats profit estimates and keeps $85 billion payouts as oil prices surge again.
